summary: Growth Engine P0 Features testing complete. Backend: 26/27 tests passed (96%). All 3 P0 features verified working: 1) Auto-Character Extraction endpoints (GET extracted-characters, POST confirm-characters, POST dismiss-extraction), 2) Public Character Page with NO AUTH required + remix_data for sharing CTA, 3) Series Completion Rewards with milestone progress (3/5/10 thresholds). Frontend: All pages load correctly - PublicCharacterPage shows character with CTA button, CreateSeries form working, SeriesTimeline shows MilestoneProgress component.

minor.issue: One test returned 404 due to token passing in pytest fixture - API works correctly when tested directly via curl

critical_code_review_comments: story_series.py 293-340: create_series properly sets extraction_status='pending_confirmation' and stores extracted_characters with confidence scoring

story_series.py 350-451: _score_and_deduplicate_characters implements role scoring (main=0.4, supporting=0.25, background=0.05), scene presence scoring, and detail richness scoring. Deduplication by name similarity. Max 3 chars with confidence >= 0.7
story_series.py 458-592: confirm-characters creates character_profiles, character_visual_bibles, character_safety_profiles for each confirmed character
story_series.py 619-633: GET extracted-characters returns extraction_status and extracted_characters array
public_routes.py 762-880: GET /api/public/character/{id} requires NO auth, returns character, visual_bible, social_proof, sample_scenes, relationships, and remix_data with prompt and remixFrom fields
story_series.py 1792-1826: MILESTONE_CONFIG defines 3 milestones (3, 5, 10 episodes) with emotional_message, rewards array, and next_loop for re-engagement
story_series.py 1838-1887: GET rewards returns pending_rewards, claimed_milestones, next_milestone with progress %, all_milestones array
story_series.py 1890-1946: POST claim-reward validates milestone, processes bonus_credits rewards, records claim in series_rewards collection
SeriesRewards.js: RewardModal displays emotional_message, rewards list with icons, next_loop CTA. MilestoneProgress shows milestone dots with claimed/reached states
SeriesTimeline.js: Integrates MilestoneProgress component, shows extraction banner when extraction_status='pending_confirmation', handles reward claiming
PublicCharacterPage.js: Displays character info, social proof (episode count, series title), CTA button triggers handleCreateStory which stores remix_data in localStorage
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing Fox Forest series and Finn character
context_for_next_testing_agent: Growth Engine P0 features fully implemented. Fox Forest series has 4 episodes, milestone 3 claimed, milestone 5 needs 1 more episode (80% progress). extraction_status is 'dismissed' for this series. Public character page at /character/:characterId works without auth and returns remix_data. RewardModal auto-shows when pending_rewards exist. MilestoneProgress shows visual milestone dots with claimed/reached states.

P0_Feature_1_Auto_Character_Extraction.GET_extracted_characters: VERIFIED - Returns extraction_status and extracted_characters array
P0_Feature_1_Auto_Character_Extraction.POST_confirm_characters: VERIFIED - Creates persistent character_profiles, character_visual_bibles, character_safety_profiles
P0_Feature_1_Auto_Character_Extraction.Confidence_Scoring: VERIFIED - Role score (0.0-0.4) + Scene presence (0.0-0.3) + Detail richness (0.0-0.3)
P0_Feature_1_Auto_Character_Extraction.Deduplication: VERIFIED - By name similarity, max 3 chars with confidence >= 0.7

P0_Feature_2_Character_Based_Sharing.Returns_remix_data: VERIFIED - Contains prompt and remixFrom with character_id, character_name, type='character_share'
P0_Feature_2_Character_Based_Sharing.Frontend_CTA_Button: VERIFIED - 'Create Your Own Story With {name}' button visible and functional

P0_Feature_3_Series_Completion_Rewards.GET_rewards: VERIFIED - Returns pending_rewards, claimed_milestones, next_milestone, all_milestones
P0_Feature_3_Series_Completion_Rewards.Milestone_3_5_10_thresholds: VERIFIED - 3 milestones configured with emotional messages and rewards
P0_Feature_3_Series_Completion_Rewards.POST_claim_reward: VERIFIED - Claims milestone, processes bonus_credits, records in series_rewards
P0_Feature_3_Series_Completion_Rewards.MilestoneProgress_UI: VERIFIED - Shows milestone dots with claimed (gold star) and reached states
P0_Feature_3_Series_Completion_Rewards.RewardModal_UI: VERIFIED - Displays on pending rewards with emotional message and claim button

failed: test_get_extracted_characters_returns_status (flaky - pytest fixture token issue, API verified working via curl)
